EmailTemplate.name: Case: gateB_Support_Case_Rückfrage_EN
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Support Request Nr. {!Case.CaseNumber}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
In order for us to process your support request {!Case.Subject} with the reference number {!Case.CaseNumber} we require further information:
Bitte hier Text erfassen
We would kindly ask you to respond to this specific email in order for your request to be assigned correctly.
Kind regards
gateB Support {!Case.OwnerFullName}
gateB AG | Empowering Marketing Performance
Sennweidstrasse 35, CH-6312 Steinhausen Phone +41 41 748 64 10, support@gateb.com http://www.gateb.com
Our opening hours: Mondays to Fridays from 8:00 AM to 12:00 AM and 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM CET
Thread Id: (ref:_{!Organization.Id}._{!Case.Id}:ref)
